assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md, the Extracted CVE Data table includes '| Deployment Context | **customer-shipped** |' (line 21). The 'Deployment Context Lookup' section (lines 23-31) shows the Source Repositories table with rhtpa-backend mapped to deployment context 'customer-shipped'. The data extraction step extracts the Deployment Context column and correctly parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md, the deployment context is recorded in the CVE metadata table (line 21: '| Deployment Context | **customer-shipped** |'). The 'Deployment Context Lookup' section (lines 23-31) explicitly states: 'Source repository rhtpa-backend was looked up in the Source Repositories table from Security Configuration' and shows the result as 'customer-shipped'.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md, all four tasks contain a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection nested under '## Implementation Notes'. Task 1 (lines 42-52), Task 2 (lines 97-103), Task 3 (lines 163-171), and Task 4 (lines 225-229) all include this subsection with customer-shipped guidance: 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md, the Coordination Guidance text in all four tasks reads: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' All three required elements (CVE assignment, advisory preparation, formal disclosure) are explicitly mentioned.
